info.title: Apollo Backend Production API
info.description: OpenAPI/Swagger specification generated from the Express routes in `backend-production`. Most CMS endpoints require the `token` cookie returned by `/api/auth/login`.

post.description: Returns user data and token in the response, and also sets the `token` cookie used by protected endpoints.

get.summary: Get about us page by ID
Get car gallery item by ID

post.summary: Upload inline content image for article editor

post.description: Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP. Maximum 20 text items and 2000 total characters per request.

message.example: Too many translation requests, please try again later.

image_status.description: JSON array string with exactly 3 items, for example `["keep","change","keep"]`.

email.description: JSON array string of email addresses.

images_description_id.description: JSON array string aligned with uploaded `images`.

images_description_en.description: JSON array string aligned with uploaded `images`.

deleted_image_ids.description: JSON array string containing image IDs to remove.
